cpp4r: A C++ Interface for R's C Interface

Source: R/cpp4r-package.R
cpp4r-package.Rd

Provides a header only, C++ interface to R's C interface. Compared to other approaches 'cpp4r' strives to be safe against long jumps from the C API as well as C++ exceptions, conform to normal R function semantics and supports interaction with 'ALTREP' vectors.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://cpp4r.org

  • https://github.com/pachadotdev/cpp4r

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/pachadotdev/cpp4r/issues
